chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1573 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 2. For orders on CMA No.4105/2023 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.4106/2023 29.01.2026 This matter is pending since 2023 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On the last date brief was held and adjournment was sought. Today applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. It appears that the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
